ambiguity: "verify the final file state" does not specify acceptance criteria or verification mechanism.
The exact README filename/extension is unspecified.
assumptions: The request targets a README file within the specified repository root.
A minimal documentation-only change is desired.
constraints: Make only a small safe README update.
Verify the final file state after the update.
context_needed: Exact README path/filename convention (e.g., README, README.md, or other).
Definition of "current status" content to record.
Expected verification method for final file state (content check, diff check, or other).
envelope.normalized_input: Inspect the repository rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo_budget3, make a minimal safe update to README documenting current status, and confirm the resulting file state.
envelope.raw_input: In the repo rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo_budget3, inspect the workspace, make a small safe README update that records the current status, and verify the final file state.
envelope.user_goal: Have README updated safely with current status information and verify the final state of the file in the specified repository.

artifact_contracts.description: Runtime-scoped repository root for all inspection and update actions.
Runtime-scoped README filename literal to preserve from user input.
Resolved README target path and baseline file facts discovered in the repository.
Observed current repository/workspace status facts to be documented in README.

metadata.ambiguity_managed: current status definition captured as explicit observed facts

artifact_contracts.description: Minimal documentation-only edit design for recording current status in README.
Record of the applied README mutation with before/after state evidence.
Verification evidence confirming final README file state after mutation.
Concise final report summarizing update outcome and verification-backed file state.

budgets.notes: Includes limited repair capacity while keeping bounded execution.

global_invariants: Preserve exact filename literal README from user input during discovery/resolution.
Apply only a small safe documentation-focused README update.
Do not claim file modifications or verification success without runtime evidence.
If README path is ambiguous, discovery must resolve and record basis before design/mutation.
MUTATE scope is limited to the resolved README target and must be followed by VERIFY evidence.
phase_plan.objective: Safely update the README in live_appv2_probe_repo_budget3 to document current status, then confirm the resulting file state with evidence.

acceptance_checks: All input_artifacts are available before phase execution.
Resolved README path, resolution basis, and existence flag are produced.
Baseline file facts are captured when file exists.
Current status facts are explicit and evidence-backed.
No file mutations are performed.
phases.goal: Resolve the README target path and capture baseline file facts plus current observed status facts.
instructions: Use repository rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo_budget3.
Preserve the exact filename literal README while resolving path.
Determine whether README exists, record resolution basis, and collect baseline fingerprint/line count when available.
Capture explicit observable current-status facts for later documentation text.
Do not mutate any files in this phase.

policy.ambiguity_handling: If README path is ambiguous, resolve and record explicit basis before proceeding.

acceptance_checks: Design artifact targets the resolved README path.
Planned text reflects discovered status facts only.
Safety constraints explicitly limit scope to README documentation change.
Expected scope is readme_only.
phases.goal: Produce a minimal readme_only update design that documents discovered current status safely.
instructions: Use discovered README target and status snapshot artifacts as the sole content basis.
Plan a minimal append/update section only; avoid broad rewrites.
Include safety constraints that keep scope documentation-only and target-bound.
If discovery indicates blocking ambiguity, encode conservative design constraints rather than inventing facts.

acceptance_checks: Mutation record includes target_path, operation, and mutation_applied flag.
Before/after fingerprints are populated.
Changed line count is recorded.
No out-of-scope file mutation is performed.
phases.goal: Apply the planned minimal README mutation and record before/after evidence.
instructions: Execute only the designed README mutation at the resolved target path.
Capture before and after fingerprints and changed line count.
Record operation type and concise diff excerpt.
Do not modify non-README files.

metadata.rationale: Resolved target path is discovered at runtime; mutation remains constrained to one README-focused file.

acceptance_checks: Verification evidence artifact is produced with all required booleans.
Evidence confirms planned status text presence.
Evidence confirms design target match.
Evidence confirms no non-README file changes.
Verification conclusions are evidence-backed.
phases.goal: Verify final README state matches design intent and confirm scope containment.
instructions: Validate target README exists after mutation and capture post-change fingerprint.
Check that planned status text is present in final README content.
Confirm verification target matches designed path.
Confirm no non-README files changed for this task and record evidence references.

acceptance_checks: Final report includes repository_root, readme_path, summaries, cited artifacts, and status.
Report cites verify_readme_final_state_evidence.
No unsupported claims are included.
phases.goal: Produce concise final outcome report citing verification evidence.
instructions: Summarize README update outcome and verification result.
Cite artifact ids used for claims, especially verification evidence.
Set status to completed only when verification evidence satisfies success criteria; otherwise blocked or failed.

phase_plan.strategy: Discover the actual README file/path and present status context, design a minimal documentation-only edit, apply the small safe mutation, verify the final README state via post-change checks, and finalize with a concise outcome report.
success_criteria: A resolved README target path is produced with baseline file facts in discover_readme_target.
A minimal readme_only update plan is produced in design_readme_minimal_update using discovered status facts.
Mutation record shows a README change was applied with before/after fingerprints in mutate_readme_update_record.
Verification evidence confirms final README exists, includes planned status text, and matches the design target.
Verification evidence indicates no non-README file changes for this task.
Final report status is completed and cites verification evidence artifact ids.

prompt: In the repo rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo_budget3, inspect the workspace, make a small safe README update that records the current status, and verify the final file state.
